zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hayward於1465年出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛可頓時，她的父親William Hayward20歲，母親Agnes Bailey21歲。她於1480年與John Nicholson在英國越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾特魯羅 聖 瑪麗享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hayward于1465年出生在英国斯塔福爾布洛可頓时，她的父亲William Hayward20岁，母亲Agnes Bailey21岁。她于1480年与John Nicholson在英国越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年在英国英格兰可瓦爾特魯羅 聖 瑪麗享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hayward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Hayworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Heyworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hayward was born in 1465, in Brocton, Staffordshire, England, her father, William Hayward, was 20 and her mother, Agnes Bailey, was 21. She married John Nicholson in 1480, in Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1495, in Truro St Mary, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hayward(이)가 1465년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브록턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hayward(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Bailey(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌 스트 메리에서 John Nicholson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 트루로 스트 메리에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hayward родилась в 1465 г. в местности броктон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Hayward было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bailey, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Nicholson в 1480 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл ст мэри, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1495 г. в местности труро ст мэри, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
